description: This file defines a data model for application notifications, including an enumeration for notification types, extension methods for string conversion, and an immutable class representing a notification object with copy capabilities.

classes.name: AppNotification
classes.description: Immutable data class representing a notification with properties such as id, title, message, type, timestamp, and read status.

methods.name: copyWith
methods.description: Creates a copy of the AppNotification instance, allowing specific fields to be overridden.
